title: Scheduler Combo5 After Seq6257 P005 Gain
module_detail: A no-anchor scheduler/reviewer keeps direct-positive local repairs after seq6257, composes non-overlapping islands, then M12 validates density_simple plus p005_area delivery.
used_in_pipeline: yes: root ./demo.sh now defaults to this DS1 method reproduction
summary: After the seq6257 best, a direct-score reviewer tested 10 more local repair candidates and promoted a five-candidate combo: SigLIP ranks 18, 6, 9, 2 plus weak rank12. Canonical p005_area IDF1 improves from 0.669019 to 0.669311.
implementation: The implementation does not train on anchors or GT identities. It rebuilds the prior no-anchor best from committed feature evidence, reruns weakmetric/SigLIP local-gated candidate generation, materializes five non-overlapping scheduler repairs after seq6257, exports a fresh submission zip, and validates direct, density_simple, and p005_area. GT is used only by the evaluator after materialization. The generated-positive lesson here is scheduler/admission: keep only local feature positives that survive full-score reviewer/opponent gates; image API positives remain future work and must use environment-variable credentials plus CTF.
environment: python with numpy pandas pyarrow scikit-learn reid-hota and Pillow
No plaintext API keys in commands, logs, scripts, repo, or S3; image-generation experiments must read OPENAI_API_KEY from env only

workflow_steps.action: reproduce feature-outlier, fresh-subpart, local-gated combo, and seq6257 stages

workflow_steps.output: 3 strong positives, 2 tiny positives, ties/negatives recorded

workflow_steps.action: compose SigLIP r18/r6/r9/r2 plus weak r12 after seq6257
export fresh submission zip, run density_simple, then p005_area with config/drop checks

visual_cases.title: Combo5 SigLIP rank18: seq2344/2390/2549
visual_cases.summary: Three component-51 tracklets move to component 29; this was the strongest individual direct-positive candidate.
visual_cases.failure_reason: The old graph kept a small component-51 island split from a component-29 identity despite local SigLIP evidence.
visual_cases.improvement: Move only the three island tracklets and keep the repair only inside a direct-positive and p005-positive combo.

visual_cases.title: Combo5 SigLIP rank06: seq7200
visual_cases.summary: seq7200 moves from component 18 to component 0.
visual_cases.failure_reason: The previous component assignment left seq7200 in a local island with weaker target evidence.
visual_cases.improvement: Single-tracklet move, admitted only after direct and combo validation.

visual_cases.title: Combo5 Weak rank12: seq582
visual_cases.summary: seq582 moves from component 2 to component 43.
visual_cases.failure_reason: A low raw-sim but high-margin weakmetric candidate was not trusted until full-score direct evidence showed a lift.
visual_cases.improvement: Promote through combo only; do not create a broad 2->43 merge.

visual_cases.title: Combo5 SigLIP rank09: seq1073
visual_cases.summary: seq1073 moves from component 88 to component 14.
visual_cases.failure_reason: The old graph left a tiny false-split island with a small direct-positive signal.
visual_cases.improvement: Keep only as part of the p005-positive combo, not as a standalone claim.

visual_cases.title: Combo5 SigLIP rank02: seq4844
visual_cases.summary: seq4844 moves from component 43 to component 36.
visual_cases.failure_reason: Standalone direct gain was only +0.000003, below the promotion threshold.
visual_cases.improvement: Retain only because the five-repair combo remains p005-positive.

visual_cases.title: Generated-positive scheduler seq6257
visual_cases.summary: A one-tracklet MCAM05/Tc6 island moves from component 30 / gid 96000032 to component 16 / gid 96000017 after local weak-positive scheduling and SigLIP-led reviewer evidence.
visual_cases.failure_reason: The previous graph kept seq6257 in component 30 even though local visual evidence across SigLIP, weakmetric and DINO manifests pointed to component 16.
visual_cases.improvement: Move only seq6257, then require direct, density_simple and p005_area end-to-end validation before promotion.

visual_cases.title: SigLIP local-gated island seq1199
visual_cases.summary: A one-tracklet MCAM03/Tc6 island moves from component 89 / gid 960000481 to component 87 / gid 960000351. This is the strongest single p005 repair.
visual_cases.failure_reason: The previous graph left seq1199 as a residual island in component 89 even though local SigLIP evidence preferred component 87.
visual_cases.improvement: Move only seq1199, then require direct+density+p005 validation before using it.

visual_cases.title: Weakmetric local-gated island seq4690
visual_cases.summary: A one-tracklet MCAM04/Tc6 island moves from component 86 / gid 960000350 to component 37 / gid 96000040.
visual_cases.failure_reason: A broad 86->37 merge is risky, but this individual island has local support and direct/p005 validation.
visual_cases.improvement: Move only seq4690; avoid broad component merge.

visual_cases.title: Weakmetric local-gated island seq5716
visual_cases.summary: A one-tracklet MCAM04/Tc6 island moves from component 9 / gid 96000010 to component 26 / gid 96000028.
visual_cases.failure_reason: The previous graph kept seq5716 in a large source component despite local evidence for component 26.
visual_cases.improvement: Move only seq5716 and keep it only because it improves the top3 combo.

ablations.name: combo5_density_simple
ablations.change: run density_simple after combo5 direct export

ablations.name: combo5_p005_area
ablations.result: IDF1 0.669311, HOTA 0.529982, AssA 0.540246, dropped 45467, config p005_area

next: Use combo5 positives as scheduler labels and keep the killed/tie direct candidates as hard negatives. Next useful step is a learned reviewer over local-gated candidates; image-generated positives should only enter after env-key API calls plus DINO/SigLIP/weakmetric CTF, never plaintext-key commands.
